dbt & Data Queens Meetup | TLV | Sep 5th 2023 | HEBREW

Hosted by sivan m. and 3 others

Tel Aviv dbt Meetup
4.9
18 reviews
Details

SOLD OUT: see you soon :)

Update: Due to high demand, we have opened a few more seats!

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: Monday.com

🤝Organizer: Data-Queens (Sivan M. and Nicole H.)

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

📝Agenda

18:00 - 18:30 | Welcome & Networking

18:30 - 18:40 | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Host

18:40 - 19:00 | Danielle Kendal, Data Engineer Team Leader, Rapyd

19:00 - 19:30 | Michal Schwartz, BI Engineer, At-Bay

19:30 - 20:00 | Shira Mairantz, Data Engineer, Tipalti

20:00 - 20:30 | Networking & Closing Remarks by Meetup Host

Call for speakers for next time and raise your hand if you are hiring and please state the company and role briefly

--------------------------

🗣️Speaker #1: Danielle Kendal (Data Engineer Team Leader, Rapyd)

"Why i got dbt? (and how it solved all my data problems*)"

Danielle will share her data journey, an actual use case and how she utilized dbt to solve it.

✍🏽About the speaker: Danielle is the data engineering team leader at Rapyd. She is passionate about everything data, from creating smart innovative pipelines to data modeling. She sees every dataset as a new challenge to conquer and rebuild. For the past 8 years, Danielle has worked in the data world, making it more accessible and user friendly wherever she goes.

--------------------------

🗣️Speaker #2: Michal Schwartz (BI Engineer, At-Bay)

"The Power of dbt Macros: Elevating Your Snapshot Process to the Next Level"

Join Michal for a technical deep dive into the world of dbt macros. Find out how dbt macros can enhance your data transformations and unlock new levels of efficiency and flexibility. Learn from her experience about how macros played a crucial role in building the At-Bay Data Warehouse infrastructure.

✍🏽About the speaker: Michal is an experienced BI/Data Engineer with a proven track record of 7 years. She has a deep understanding of data warehousing concepts and technologies, and has extensive experience designing and developing data models. She is also proficient in implementing robust ETL processes that ensure data accuracy and efficiency. Michal is passionate about empowering organizations to maximize the potential of their data assets for informed decision-making.

--------------------------

🗣️Speaker #3: Shira Mairantz (Data Engineer, Tipalti)

"A Journey Through DBT Evolution at Tipalti"

Shira will guide us through multiple checkpoints along the dbt life cycle within Tipalti, with a notable pause at the significant growth station.

✍🏽About the speaker: "Having worked as a senior data engineer at Tipalti for the past 3 years, coupled with my extensive 15-year background in diverse databases, data streaming, and DWH modeling, I confidently claim data as my realm.For me, the equation of coding +data +business equals personal growth!"

--------------------------

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/

🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-israel channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

----------------------------------

dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

----------------------------------

Data Queens is Israel's premier community dedicated to uniting, promoting, and empowering women in various data-driven fields. Founded in 2020, Data Queens harnesses the power of community to build professional and social connections, helping women in data science, data analytics, and related sectors excel in their careers.

www.data-queens.com

*Our meetups feature women speakers and are open to all genders.

*Lectures will be held in Hebrew

Report Ad
Coalesce: The Analytics Engineering Conference
Network event
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Tel Aviv dbt Meetup
4.9
18 reviews
Details

In case you missed it, dbt Labs is hosting Coalesce 2022 from October 17 - 21. It is the annual conference dedicated to advancing the practice of analytics engineering. Coalesce offers data practitioners an opportunity to deepen their knowledge and network. You can choose your own adventure including in-person, online, and hybrid experiences.

Coalesce Online (FREE) | October 17-21, 2022. The online experience that you know and love. Connect with data practitioners around the globe in sessions designed for North America, APAC, EMEA and LATAM regions. Catch live stream sessions from Coalesce New Orleans, interact with the community and speakers via Slack, and attend exclusively virtual sessions.
Coalesce New Orleans | October 17-21, 2022 | Located at the Hyatt Regency, New Orleans. Our first time together, in person! Attend a presentation, workshop, or panel discussion. Participate in activities, a hackathon, intimate discussions, and social activities. Meet community members and partners while exploring the history and culture of New Orleans.
Coalesce Online + | London, 20 October 2022 | Sydney, 21 October 2022. A one-day event taking place in London and Sydney, complementing Coalesce Online. This will include tech talks, hosted discussions, an Executive keynote and a post-event networking session.

⚠️Please note that Coalesce 2022 won't be hosted on Meetup.com.
✅REGISTER + SIGN UP for sessions here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com
📅Review the schedule here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com/schedule
⭐As a member of the dbt Meetup Network, please use your discount code MEETUP15 for Premium and GA tickets.

Tel Aviv first dbt Meetup! (in-person)
D

Hosted by dbt L. and 2 others

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Tel Aviv dbt Meetup
4.9
18 reviews
Details

We are excited to help bring TLV-based folks in the dbt Community together! Looking forward to building community, making connections, and learning together.

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

Location: Elementor (Tuval 40, floor 15, Ramat Gan. Near Arlozorov train station)
Organizer: Maayan Salom (Elementary Data)
Host: Amihay Gonen (Elementor)

✅Agenda and additional details below:
✨ 6:00pm | Doors open. Come and network!

✨ 6:30 - 6:55pm | Talk #1 + Q&A | dbt at Elementor - Slowly Changing Dimensions (type 2) from event based data stream using dbt .
(Daniel Harari, Data Engineer @ Elementor)

✨6:55 - 7:05pm Break

✨7:05 - 7:30pm | Talk #2 + Q&A | dbt Artifacts - Unlocking their Potential: This talk will show macros, models and tests they wrote to utilize dbt artifacts for some use cases.
(Or Avidov, CTO @ Elementary Data)

✨7:30-8:30 | Networking and refreshments

📣 For updates, join the conversation in the #local-israel channel in dbt Slack! This is where the chat will also take place during meetups.
Join the dbt Slack community:
https://www.getdbt.com/community/

👆 Stay tuned for more details on these talks!

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

***
dbt is a command line tool that speaks the preferred language of data analysts everywhere—SQL. With dbt, analysts take ownership of the entire analytics engineering workflow, from writing data transformation code to deployment and documentation.
